nasb.text: For you were called to freedom, brethren; only do not turn your freedom into an opportunity for the flesh, but through love serve one another.

esv.text: For you were called to freedom, brothers. Only do not use your freedom as an opportunity for the flesh, but through love serve one another.

cnv.text: 弟兄們，你們蒙召得了自由；只是不可把這自由當作放縱情慾的機會，總要憑著愛心互相服事。

ccb.text: 弟兄姊妹，你们蒙召得了自由，但不要以自由为借口来放纵情欲，要本着爱心互相服侍，

csbs.text: 弟兄们，你们蒙召是为了得自由，只是不可用这自由给肉体一个机会，而是要藉着爱彼此服事，
